content:
- Executed task 01 (secure explicit node config): expanded runtime config schema to include explicit API/Postgres TLS structs, API auth enum, postgres conn identity (user/dbname/sslmode), roles/auth enums, pg_hba/pg_ident sources, and DCS init payload placeholder.
- Implemented version-gated config parsing via config_version envelope; v1 uses legacy PartialRuntimeConfig + defaults; v2 parses strict v2 schema then fails closed with a clear validation error.
- Migrated all RuntimeConfig literals across src/tests/examples/harness to new schema shape; removed legacy RuntimeConfig.security and ApiConfig token fields; updated API worker to read auth + tls mode from cfg.api.security.
- Promoted pginfo module visibility so PgSslMode is reachable from public config types; added serde Deserialize for PgSslMode and made it Copy.
- Updated runtime local_postgres_dsn to use config-provided identity fields and render sslmode explicitly.
- Fixed clippy restriction failure by avoiding assert!(false, ..) and switching test to Result-returning pattern.
- Gates: make check ✅, make lint ✅, make test ✅ (200 unit tests + bdd + real-binary), make test-long ✅.
- Marked task 01 as passing and ran task_switch.sh.
